creditorId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the Creditor by the CSP.

creditorServiceProviderId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the CSP during Mastercard onboarding.

creditorReturnString.description: Return string (in URL encoded format) that is passed to the DSP to return the Debtor back to the Creditor's checkout page.

ultimateCreditorId.description: Unique identifier assigned by the CSP of the ultimateCreditor to which the Payment is requested. When this value is populated, ultimateCreditor's Trade name is returned in creditorTradeName to DSP, which is displayed on the Mobile Banking App.

creditorAccount.description: Creditor's Account Information. Either the IBAN or account number should be used. This is provided only for Me-to-Me payments.
